# LLM Site Tooling Index

Canonical wiki: `wiki/`

Read these files before site design or implementation work:

- `AGENT_SITE_TOOLING.md`
- `agents/TEAM.md`
- `wiki/concepts/ai-site-development-workflow.md`
- `wiki/concepts/agent-site-tooling-routing.md`
- `wiki/concepts/site-resource-manifest.md`
- `purpose.md`
- `schema.md`
- `wiki/index.md`
- recent entries in `wiki/log.md`

Do not start frontend implementation until a product/design brief, selected stack, deployment direction, and selected visual direction are recorded in the wiki.
No frontend app is bundled. Stack is selected through dialogue, and deployment planning must compare VPS/VDS vs hosting with pros and cons before recommending a publication target.
